types.name: GMS signed-off
types.description: This panel has undergone review by a NHSE GMS disease specialist group and processes to be signed-off for use within the GMS.

publications: 21763481 - two affected fetuses form the same family displayed overlapping phenotypes including cystic kidneys, ductal plate malformation, polydactyly, and occipital encephalocele. Homozygous variant identified in this gene, which was not present in the unaffected son. Homozygous variants were not identified in other known Meckel syndrome genes
26092869 - two further cases with Joubert syndrome reported from two different families
